description: Default safety policy for filesystem and shell operations

rules.description: rm -rf / or rm -rf ~ — non-bypassable, ever
rules.message: rm -rf on root or home directory is permanently denied.

rules.description: rm -rf with glob expansion — blast radius unbound
rules.message: rm -rf with glob expansion is not allowed — blast radius is unbounded.

rules.description: rm -rf with variable expansion — empty var collapses to rm -rf /
rules.message: rm -rf with unresolved variable — empty variable would collapse to rm -rf /.

rules.description: rm without an explicit path argument
rules.message: rm requires an explicit path argument.

rules.description: rm -rf on known system paths
rules.message: rm -rf on a system path is permanently denied.

rules.description: dd targeting a block device — will wipe disk
rules.message: dd to a block device is permanently denied.

rules.description: Output redirection to /dev/* — direct disk write
rules.message: Output redirection to a device node is permanently denied.

rules.description: mv to /dev/null — silent data destruction
rules.message: mv to /dev/null is permanently denied.

rules.description: mkfs and fdisk — disk-level destructive operations
rules.message: Disk formatting and partition operations are permanently denied.

rules.description: Pipe into bare rm — blast radius unknown without explicit filter
rules.message: Piping into rm without explicit path filter is denied.

rules.description: chown / chgrp on system paths — privilege escalation risk
rules.message: chown/chgrp on system paths is permanently denied.

rules.description: chmod -R on system paths
rules.message: chmod -R on system paths is permanently denied.

rules.description: chmod 777 — world-writable permissions
rules.message: chmod 777 makes files world-writable. Explicit approval required.

rules.description: chmod -R affecting more than 100 files
rules.message: chmod -R on >100 files requires explicit approval.

rules.description: chown / chgrp -R affecting more than 100 files
rules.message: chown/chgrp -R on >100 files requires explicit approval.

rules.description: find -delete or find -exec rm
rules.message: find with deletion requires explicit approval.

rules.description: Any destructive command run with sudo
rules.message: Destructive commands with sudo require explicit approval.

rules.description: rm -rf (non-denied) — dry-run first
rules.message: rm -rf requires sandbox impact assessment before execution.

rules.description: rsync — preview before sync
rules.message: rsync requires --dry-run preview before execution.

rules.description: Read-only commands always pass through
rules.message: Read-only operations are allowed.
